name: Bruschetta with Brasaola, Eggplant and Mozzarella
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound Bresaola, sliced paper thin (12-15 slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10- to 12-inch sauté pan, heat olive oil until smoking.
2. Add onion and cook until soft, about 9 to 10 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, cut eggplant into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
4. When onion has softened, add eggplant to the pan and cook, stirring regularly until eggplant is darkened and soft.
5. Add 2 tablespoons red wine vinegar and remove from heat to cool.
6. Cut fresh mozzarella into 1/4-inch cubes and add to cooled eggplant mixture.
7. Add basil and season with salt and pepper.
8. Grill or toast bread on both sides.
9. Spoon a generous amount of the eggplant mixture over each slice of bread.
10. Place 3 slices Bresaola (or Prosciutto/Capicola) over top of the eggplant mixture and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
